message:
test(http/h2): add frame header and settings builder tests

frame.rs:
- Add test_frame_header_parse_insufficient_bytes to verify
  ProtocolError when frame header has only 8 bytes (needs 9)

settings.rs:
- Extend builder test to include continuation_timeout_ms setting
- Verifies the builder properly sets the timeout value

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
